title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Stryker India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Stryker India
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
